texto: Racism watching is a puzzle solving activity and often involves debunking pseudo-science. The investigator must try to figure out what makes people believe in weird ideas. As Stieg said in an interview, ‘Fifty years later, people still believe in this; the whole Neo-Nazi movement. There is absolutely no sense in this. They do it contrary to everything science tells us. Contrary to human goodness or altruism, contrary to rational thinking. And this is fascinating, why?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Eric Bronson que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Racism watching is a puzzle solving activity and often involves debunking pseudo-science. The inv…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, neonazis, pseudoscience, com foco em pseudoscience e racism.
